entities.name: INSECT PEST AND DAMAGE ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating the incidence and impact of insect pests at pod maturity

entities.name: POD FLY
entities.description: Melanagromyza chalcosoma, an insect pest that caused the majority of seed damage

entities.name: POD BORERS
entities.description: Insect pests including Etiella zinckenella, Lampides sp. and Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: POD-SUCKING BUGS
entities.description: Clavigralla tomentosicollis, an insect pest causing seed damage

entities.name: SEED DAMAGE
entities.description: The percentage of seed loss or damage caused by insect pests

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO POD FLY
entities.description: The capacity of specific pigeonpea lines to resist damage from pod fly

entities.name: ICEAP LINES
entities.description: Specific pigeonpea lines (00953-00958) evaluated for pest damage and tolerance
